commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
feat: dream pipeline v1.3 — workspace diff context, groundDream(), and notification fallback (#58)

* feat: capture workspace file diffs at agent_end for richer reflections

At agent_end, run `git diff --stat HEAD` to capture which files changed
during the session. The diff summary is stored as `file_diffs` in the
encrypted deep memory entry alongside the conversation summary.

The formatDeepMemoryContext function now surfaces file change info, and
the dream/reflection/synthesis prompts are updated to incorporate file
change context — so reflections can surface what was actually built, not
just what was discussed.

Gracefully skips if git is unavailable or there are no changes.

Fix print page breaks and compact layout

- hr { display: none } in print: removes ~8 decorative separators that
  were consuming ~120px on page 1, causing Experience to start on page 2
- Replace ul page-break-inside:avoid with li page-break-inside:avoid:
  allows bullet lists to flow across pages while keeping each bullet
  intact — fixes Total Keto Diet (and similar) entries splitting poorly
- h3 margin-top: 0.55rem provides visual job entry separation without hr
- blockquote margin-bottom: 0.45rem adds breathing room after tech stacks
- Reduce base font 11px→10.5px, line-height 1.5→1.4 for denser output
- Add width:auto to img for correct badge scaling in print
- Tighter margins on h2, h3, .cv-header, p across the board

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.1.1: fix history resume, stop/start, heartbeat context, UI indicators

History & Context:
- load_history() restores agent._history from context.json on server restart
- chat/tick now store full Anthropic-format messages as "turn" events (incl.
  tool_use IDs and tool_result content) — history reconstruction is now lossless
- inbox_offset starts at current file size to prevent inbox replay on restart
- Heartbeat agent responses tagged triggered_by="heartbeat" in outbox for UI styling

Stop / Start:
- Fixed heartbeat firing after stop: tick() skips outbox write if is_stopped()
- Indicator light now grey when stopped or kanban empty (was always green if pid exists)
- Stop/Start buttons immediately refresh instance list (was waiting 3s poll)
- Crashed instances (in _finished) can be restarted via Start button

Server startup:
- Discovered instances printed as one line: "Discovered: A, B, C [total N]"
- "Resumed" log only shown when kanban has pending work; idle instances are silent
- Always loads history regardless of kanban state

Bump version 0.1.0 → 0.1.1

commit.message:
fix: rewrite matching engine with strict hard filters + ranked scoring

Hard filters (instant disqualify):
- City must be in preferred areas
- Bathrooms must match exactly
- Bedrooms must be exact or +1 (never fewer than requested)
- Price must be within budget min-max
- SqFt must meet minimum (when listing has data)

Soft scoring (100 pts, ranks survivors):
- Budget position in range (30 pts, center scores higher)
- Bedrooms exact vs +1 (25 / 12 pts)
- Bathrooms (15 pts)
- City (15 pts)
- Property type (10 pts)
- SqFt 20%+ above min bonus (5 pts)

Guards: skip clients with no city AND no budget set.
Rental weeks: skip listings with no availability data when weeks selected.

Handle SLURM TIMEOUT by resubmitting training fold to continue from checkpoint

exception to distinguish timeout from hard failures.

Also update .env files: reduce SLURM_MEM_TRAIN to 64G, fix b40x4-long
training time to 2-00:00:00.

commit.message:
Implement Core + Transport layers: interfaces, models, adapters

Core layer (34 files):
- 12 interfaces: IAuthClient, IAccountClient, ILeaderboardClient,
  IChatClient, IStorageClient, IFriendsClient, IGroupsClient,
  INotificationClient, ITournamentClient, IGameClient, IGameSession,
  IGameSocket
- 12 model files: Auth, Account, Leaderboard, Chat, Storage, Friends,
  Groups, Notifications, Tournaments, Presence, ErrorResponse, BanInfo
- GameApiException, RetryConfiguration

Transport layer:
- 4 interfaces: IHttpAdapter, IWebSocketAdapter, ISerializer, ITokenStorage
- 2 DTOs: HttpRequest, HttpResponse
- 4 adapters: UnityWebRequestAdapter, NativeWebSocketAdapter,
  NewtonsoftSerializer, PlayerPrefsTokenStorage

Remove template files (RuntimeExample.cs, EditorExample.cs)

commit.message:
fix: correct win/lose logic in brain battle game

- WIN only when enemy HP reaches 0 (player answered enough correctly)
- LOSE when: player HP reaches 0, time runs out on all questions, or
  all questions answered but enemy still has HP remaining
- Add explicit `won` flag instead of relying on playerHp check
- Fix false wins when questions exhausted but enemy survived

commit.message:
fix: #42 sudo inference for privileged paths, #62 SEC010 false positive for copia delta ops

- Auto-detect file resources writing to /etc/, /usr/lib/systemd/, /boot/,
  /var/lib/, /opt/, /usr/local/bin/ or with owner: root — require sudo: true
- Skip inference when machine user=root (sudo not needed)
- Strip copia delta temp file ops (rm -f "$TMPFILE", mv "$TMPFILE") from
  bashrs linting to avoid SEC010 false positives
- 8 new tests for sudo inference covering all branches

Refs PMAT-053
